nasb.text: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination to the Lord, But the prayer of the upright is His delight.

esv.text: The sacrifice of the wicked is an abomination to the Lord, but the prayer of the upright is acceptable to him.

cnv.text: 惡人的祭物是耶和華厭惡的； 正直人的禱告卻是他所喜悅的。

ccb.text: 耶和华憎恨恶人的祭物， 悦纳正直人的祈祷。

csbs.text: 恶人的祭物，为耶和华所憎恶； 正直人的祷告，为他所悦纳。
